message.content:
@startuml
skinparam actorStyle circle
skinparam lifestyle rectangle

title UML Sequence Diagram

participant Actor
participant EventBus
participant Service Orchestrator
participant Software Defined Infrastructure

participant so1
participant so2

participant storageresource1
participant storageresource2

Actor -> so1 : Version Application Stack
so1 -> storageresource1 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
storageresource1 <- data.list : data.list
so1 -> storageresource2 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
storageresource2 <- data.list : data.list

Actor -> EventBus : data.list
EventBus -> so1 : data.list
so1 -> storageresource2 : list (name: hello,file: ./templates/world.yml)
storageresource2 <- data.list : data.list

@enduml
